title: RotationSettings
description: Settings for the Rotation sync task.

angle.description:
Rotation angle in degrees. Must satisfy:
- angle % 90 == 0
- angle % 360 != 0
Only 90, 180, or 270 are valid.

axis.description: Axis of rotation. For 2D tensors only 'Z' is allowed. Supported values are: 'X', 'Y', 'Z'.
